description: Configure the OpenBCI GUI to play back the EEG recording `~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt` and stream the raw data via UDP to `127.0.0.1` on port `9000` using the BrainFlow Streamer. The session must run for at least 15 seconds. Note: Use the BrainFlow Streamer settings in the Control Panel rather than the Networking Widget.
